label: Verified and assurance-gated agents

node.label: Verified and assurance-gated agents
node.definition: Verified agentic systems place formal checks, typed actions, runtime monitors, permissions, and release gates around agents that can modify software or external state.
node.why_it_matters: They define a deployable pattern for giving agents consequential authority without treating generated actions as trusted by default.
limitations: Assurance coverage remains partial when goals, tools, observations, and environments are open-ended.

dependencies.rationale: Verified and assurance-gated agents integrates Autonomous software-engineering agents as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

sentence_units.text: Verified agentic systems place formal checks, typed actions, runtime monitors, permissions, and release gates around agents that can modify software or external state.
They define a deployable pattern for giving agents consequential authority without treating generated actions as trusted by default.
Assurance coverage remains partial when goals, tools, observations, and environments are open-ended.
